title: Matte Black Trophy Premium Poster
sourceTitle: Matte Black Fifa World Cup Trophy Premium 3D Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end commercial 3D render of FIFA World Cup trophy centered on matte black cylindrical pedestal. Subject: FIFA World Cup trophy has polished gold surface reflecting overhead stadium lights with sharp specular highlights and iconic central presence. Scene: dark stadium draw-night interior with red-accented draw bowls with blurred dark stadium interior, glowing red-accented draw bowls, realistic green artificial turf in the foreground, and soft atmospheric vignette. Composition: Strictly symmetrical eye-level medium shot on 50mm lens: trophy centered, swirling blue fabric ribbons printed with various national flags weave through the foreground framing the icon, pedestal anchored on textured turf. Signature Elements: Preserved matte black fifa world cup trophy premium 3d poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic high-end commercial 3D render, professional sports premium poster, clean symmetrical composition, warm gold against dark moody stadium, and collectible tournament visual finish. Color Palette: Polished FIFA gold, matte black pedestal, cool blue flag ribbons, dark stadium blacks, glowing red draw-bowl accents, and green artificial turf. Lighting: Studio spotlighting, top-down illumination, high contrast, sharp gold highlights, cool blue ribbon accents, and controlled atmospheric vignette. Restrictions: Preserve FIFA World Cup trophy, national flag ribbons, matte black pedestal, artificial turf, and stadium draw setting from the source;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
